hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^\s*pnpm\s+(-r\s+|--recursive\s+|(-\w+\s+)*--filter\s+\S+\s+).*\bpublish\b'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Прямая публикация через pnpm заблокирована. Используй только pnpm release:platform или pnpm release:sdk"}}'; exit 0; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bpnpm\s+kb\s+release\s+(run|publish)\b'; then case "$cmd" in *--flow*) : ;; *) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"pnpm kb release run/publish без --flow заблокирован. Используй pnpm release:platform или pnpm release:sdk"}}'; exit 0 ;; esac; fi
